% https://q.uiver.app/#
\documentclass[tikz]{standalone}
\input{preambles.tex}
\begin{document}
\begin{tikzcd}
	& {(X\otimes X) \otimes X} & \\
	{(X\otimes X) \otimes X} && {X\otimes (X\otimes X)} \\
	{X\otimes (X\otimes X)} && {X\otimes (X\otimes X)} \\
	{X\otimes (X\otimes X)} && {(X\otimes X) \otimes X} \\
	{(X\otimes X) \otimes X} && {(X\otimes X) \otimes X} \\
	{(X\otimes X) \otimes X} && {X\otimes(X\otimes X)} \\
	& {X\otimes(X\otimes X)}
	\arrow["{r\otimes \id_X}"', from=1-2, to=2-1]
	\arrow["{\alpha_{X,X,X}}", from=1-2, to=2-3]
	\arrow["{\alpha_{X,X,X}}"', from=2-1, to=3-1]
	\arrow["{\id_X \otimes r}", from=2-3, to=3-3]
	\arrow["{\id_X \otimes r}"', from=3-1, to=4-1]
	\arrow["{\alpha_{X,X,X}^{-1}}", from=3-3, to=4-3]
	\arrow["{\alpha_{X,X,X}^{-1}}"', from=4-1, to=5-1]
	\arrow["{r \otimes \id_X}", from=4-3, to=5-3]
	\arrow["{r \otimes \id_X}"', from=5-1, to=6-1]
	\arrow["{\alpha_{X,X,X}}", from=5-3, to=6-3]
	\arrow["{\alpha_{X,X,X}}"', from=6-1, to=7-2]
	\arrow["{\id \otimes r}", from=6-3, to=7-2]
\end{tikzcd}
\end{document}
